title: Psalms, Chapter 134
description: Complete text of Psalms chapter 134 from the King James Version (1611).
introduction: Complete text of Psalms chapter 134 from the King James Version (1611).

translation.text:
<sup>1</sup>Behold, bless ye the LORD, all
ye servants of the LORD, which by night stand in the house of the LORD. <sup>2</sup>Lift up your hands
in the sanctuary, and bless the LORD. <sup>3</sup>The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
